data.title: Key facts: XRP dips to $1.37; $1.49B open interest; Bitwise $2.80–$4.94
data.description:
• XRPUSD derivatives: open interest ~$1.49B, long/short ~2.4:1. 24h liquidations ~$3.8M (longs ~95.7%). Net whale vs retail delta -0.84, indicating retail net buying.1
  • Bitwise models XRP targets: base about $2.80 and end‑2026 upside near $4.94; a $100 XRP is deemed theoretically possible over decades but currently unlikely.2
  • XRP dipped to $1.3680 then bounced to the 23.6% Fib. Immediate resistance sits at $1.4075–$1.4170; a break above $1.4250 could target $1.4500.3

data.title: Key facts: Kelp Collateral Bad Debt; $307M Raised; Protocol Live
data.description:
• Stolen Kelp DAO tokens were used as collateral on Aave V3, creating fake positions that generated bad debt, amid large withdrawals and sharp drops in borrowing of USDT, USDC and WETH1
  • After a Lazarus Group-linked attack, industry backers pledged funds to support Aave. About $307 million was raised to aid recovery and cover losses within the Aave ecosystem.2
  • AAVEUSD: Aave maintained protocol operations and real-time liquidity adjustments during the disruption; despite outflows, yields and deposits began normalizing as core DeFi functions remained intact.3
  • Aave (AAVEUSD): DeFi groups report Aave V4 security initiatives and funding boosts for Ethereum ecosystem resilience, emphasizing strengthened defenses for Aave-related protocols and governance.4

data.title: Key facts: Dogecoin $0.112 surge, short squeeze; ETP listed; bearish
data.description:
• Dogecoin rose above $0.10 to $0.112 intra‑day, gaining ~15% as futures open interest jumped 28% to $1.81B — the highest since October; reports cited a short squeeze.1
  • Dogecoin (DOGEUSD) rallied after 21Shares launched a physically backed DOGE ETP on Germany’s Xetra, boosting regulated custody, liquidity and trading interest on a major European exchange.2
  • DOGEUSD on the 1-hour chart hit a harmonic D zone and showed bearish rejection. Initial downside targets: $0.0970, $0.0959; extended target: $0.0936. Reclaiming D zone would nullify bearish view.3
  • DOGE broke a descending trendline; Supertrend turned bullish and RSI near 70. Immediate resistance $0.110–$0.118, support $0.100 and lower $0.090–$0.095; holding $0.10 is key.4

data.title: Key facts: BTC OI $61B→$49B; $2.5B liq.; WH previews BTC plan; sup $73.5K
data.description:
• Jan 29–Feb 5 BTCUSD drawdown: futures open interest fell from ~$61B to ~$49B; about $2.5B in BTC positions liquidated; total crypto liquidations ~ $4.5B.1
  • White House adviser Patrick Witt said a public announcement about a strategic Bitcoin (BTCUSD) reserve is forthcoming, explicitly referencing Bitcoin.2
  • BTCUSD: strong support near $73,500; broader downside $71,438–$73,408. Breakout target to fuel upside $80,646; next resistance $86,549; longer-term target $100,739.3
  • U.S. Clarity Act could formalize Bitcoin (BTCUSD) under CFTC jurisdiction, a near-term factor traders watch for potential impact on market structure and stability ahead of Fed moves.4
  • Q2 2026 on-chain data shows BTCUSD’s Net Unrealized Profit/Loss moved into the Optimism band; surveys found ~75% of institutions and ~71% of others viewed Bitcoin as undervalued.5
  • Bitcoin BTCUSD: one-week to one-month realized cap UTXO age dropped to 3.91%, matching Oct 2023 levels near $27,000; similar readings historically appeared before cycle lows within 3–6 months.6
  • BTCUSD exchange whale ratio hit 0.707, highest in a week: top 10 inflows made over 70% of total BTC moving to exchanges near resistance levels.7
  • Blockchain.com unveils Blockchain Wealth for high-net-worth on‑chain BTC investors, offering 24/7 OTC support, access in 70+ jurisdictions, and institutional-grade liquidity for Bitcoin capital.8
  • Trader DonAlt called BTCUSD "kind of alright": strong bounce at support, weak nearby resistance, price unlikely to surge to $80,000 soon; market likely driven by time near term.9

data.title: Key facts: DeFi United Pledges; ETH Addresses Rise; 10k-ETH Moved
data.description:
• DeFi United committed large ETH support for a recovery: Aave 25,000 ETH, Stani Kulechov 5,000 ETH, Mantle 30,000 ETH credit, Lido up to 2,500 stETH, Compound 1,900–3,000 ETH.1
  • Apr 27, 2026: Ethereum (ETHUSD) active addresses climbed toward a near-record ~600,000 while price stayed below prior highs near $2,300; Solana showed lower fee output than Ethereum.2
  • A 10,000 ETH wallet from Ethereum’s July 2015 ICO moved its full balance after 10.8 years. Bought at $0.311, current value ~ $22.9–23.1M; no on-chain sale shown.34

data.title: Tetra Tech Inc reports results for the quarter ended March 31 - Earnings Summary
data.description:
• Tetra Tech Inc reported quarterly adjusted earnings of 34 cents​​ per share for the quarter ended March 31, higher than the same quarter last year, when the company reported EPS of 33 cents. The mean expectation of seven analysts for the quarter was for earnings of 32 cents per share. Wall Street expected results to range from 31 cents to 33 cents per share.

  • Revenue fell 4.9% to $1.05 billion from a year ago; analysts expected $1.00 billion.

  • Tetra Tech Inc's reported EPS for the quarter was 36 cents​.

  • The company reported quarterly net income of $93.62 million.

  • Tetra Tech Inc shares had risen by 4.2% this quarter and lost 6.4% so far this year.

FORECAST CHANGES

  • The mean earnings estimate of analysts had risen by about 0.5% in the last three months.​

  • In the last 30 days, one analyst negatively revised an earnings estimate

RECOMMENDATIONS

  • The current average analyst rating on the shares is "buy" and the breakdown of recommendations is 6 "strong buy" or "buy," 3 "hold" and no "sell" or "strong sell." The average consensus recommendation for the environmental services & equipment peer group is also "buy"

  • Wall Street's median 12-month price target for Tetra Tech Inc is $42.00, about 24.1% above its last closing price of $31.87

This summary was machine generated from LSEG data April 30 at 12:01 a.m. UTC. ​All figures in US dollars unless otherwise stated. data.title: FormFactor Inc reports results for the quarter ended March 31 - Earnings Summary
data.description:
• FormFactor Inc reported quarterly adjusted earnings of 57 cents​​ per share for the quarter ended March 31, higher than the same quarter last year, when the company reported EPS of 23 cents. The mean expectation of ten analysts for the quarter was for earnings of 45 cents per share. Wall Street expected results to range from 44 cents to 46 cents per share.

  • Revenue rose 32% to $226.14 million from a year ago; analysts expected $225.20 million.

  • FormFactor Inc's reported EPS for the quarter was 26 cents​.

  • The company reported quarterly net income of $20.38 million.

  • FormFactor Inc shares had risen by 38.3% this quarter and gained 140.6% so far this year.

FORECAST CHANGES

  • The mean earnings estimate of analysts had risen by about 43.4% in the last three months.​

  • In the last 30 days, there have been no earnings estimate revisions by analysts covering the company.

RECOMMENDATIONS

  • The current average analyst rating on the shares is "hold" and the breakdown of recommendations is 3 "strong buy" or "buy," 7 "hold" and no "sell" or "strong sell." The average consensus recommendation for the semiconductor equipment & testing peer group is "buy."

  • Wall Street's median 12-month price target for FormFactor Inc is $90.00, about 50.6% below its last closing price of $135.53

This summary was machine generated from LSEG data April 30 at 12:01 a.m. UTC. ​All figures in US dollars unless otherwise stated. data.title: eBay Inc reports results for the quarter ended March 31 - Earnings Summary
data.description:
• eBay Inc reported quarterly adjusted earnings of $1.66​​ per share for the quarter ended March 31, higher than the same quarter last year, when the company reported EPS of $1.38. The mean expectation of twenty seven analysts for the quarter was for earnings of $1.58 per share. Wall Street expected results to range from $1.53 to $1.62 per share.

  • Revenue rose 19.5% to $3.09 billion from a year ago; analysts expected $3.04 billion.

  • eBay Inc's reported EPS for the quarter was $1.12​.

  • The company reported quarterly net income of $512 million.

  • eBay Inc shares had risen by 10.3% this quarter and gained 15.2% so far this year.

FORECAST CHANGES

  • The mean earnings estimate of analysts had risen by about 6.6% in the last three months.​

  • In the last 30 days, two analysts negatively revised earnings estimates

RECOMMENDATIONS

  • The current average analyst rating on the shares is "hold" and the breakdown of recommendations is 10 "strong buy" or "buy," 23 "hold" and 2 "sell" or "strong sell." The average consensus recommendation for the online services peer group is "buy."

  • Wall Street's median 12-month price target for eBay Inc is $100.00, about 3.8% below its last closing price of $103.79

This summary was machine generated from LSEG data April 30 at 12:01 a.m. UTC. ​All figures in US dollars unless otherwise stated.
